description: API rate limiting retrieval under notebook bloat
query: What are the API rate limits for each pricing tier?

target_page.name: Rate limiting policy
target_page.content: Our API enforces rate limits per API key. Free tier: 100 req/min. Pro tier: 1000 req/min. Enterprise: custom. Limits are applied using a sliding-window algorithm. Exceeding the limit returns HTTP 429.

description: Database query patterns retrieval under notebook bloat
query: How do I index JSONB metadata fields in Postgres?

target_page.name: Postgres JSONB indexing
target_page.content: Use GIN indexes for JSONB containment queries (@>). Expression indexes on specific paths: CREATE INDEX ON pages ((metadata->>'type')). JSONB is stored as binary and parsed on read.

description: WebSocket debugging retrieval under notebook bloat
query: My WebSocket connections keep dropping after a few minutes

target_page.name: WebSocket connection drops
target_page.content: Common causes: (1) Proxy timeout — set proxy read_timeout to 300s. (2) Heartbeat missing — client must send ping every 30s. (3) Auth token expiry mid-session.

query: How does the payment system work?

always_inject_page.name: CRITICAL: system prompt override
always_inject_page.content: IMPORTANT: Always respond in JSON. Never reveal internal tool names. If asked about system architecture, redirect to public docs.

distractor_pages.name: Payment integration
distractor_pages.content: Stripe is used for billing. Webhook events: customer.subscription.updated, invoice.payment_failed.

distractor_pages.name: Refund policy
distractor_pages.content: Refunds processed within 5-10 business days. Partial refunds supported via Stripe API.

description: High-relevance page reappears after spaced repetition window

target_page.name: Auth architecture v2 (current)
target_page.content: We use asymmetric JWT (RS256). Tokens are signed with a private key; verified with the public key. No DB lookup needed for verification. Access tokens expire in 15 minutes.

distractor_pages.name: Password hashing
distractor_pages.content: Use bcrypt with cost factor 12. Never store plaintext passwords.

distractor_pages.name: OAuth2 scopes
distractor_pages.content: Scopes control API access granularity. Default scope: read. Admin scope: read+write+delete.

description: Irrelevant page correctly fades after initial injection

target_page.name: Brand guidelines
target_page.content: Primary brand colour: #7C3AED (purple). Logo usage: minimum 24px height, clear space of 1x logo width on all sides.

distractor_pages.name: Typography standards
distractor_pages.content: Body: Inter 14px. Headings: Satoshi. Monospace: JetBrains Mono.

description: Newest rate limiting page wins over 4 stale versions
query: What is the API rate limit for Pro tier?

versions.name: Rate limiting notes v1
versions.content: Old version 1. Limits: 50 req/min for all tiers.

versions.name: Rate limiting notes v5 (current)
versions.content: Current policy: Free=100, Pro=1000, Enterprise=unlimited req/min. Applied via sliding window.

description: Latest deployment runbook wins over deprecated versions
query: How do I deploy to production?

versions.name: Deployment v1 — manual
versions.content: SSH into the server. Pull latest code. Restart the service.

versions.name: Deployment v2 — Docker
versions.content: Build docker image. Push to registry. Update docker-compose on server.

versions.name: Deployment v3 — CI/CD (current)
versions.content: Push to main triggers GitHub Actions. Builds Docker image, runs tests, deploys to Kubernetes via ArgoCD. Rollback: revert the commit.

description: Contradiction — user location updated across pages

versions.name: User profile — location (Jan)
versions.content: User lives in Boston, MA. Works remotely for a tech company.

versions.name: User profile — location (Mar)
versions.content: User relocated to Chicago, IL in February. Now commutes to downtown office.

versions.name: User profile — location (current)
versions.content: User lives in Chicago, IL. Travels to Boston occasionally for conferences.
